[SDD:AMEND_R] amend protocol escalation — human review required
  SCENARIO: <relative-path-to-scenario-file>
  DIVERGENCE: <failed-gate-name>
  EVIDENCE: <gate-failure-reason>
  PROPOSED AMEND: see amend_request payload
  PUERTAS_STALENESS: <PASS|FAIL|SKIP>
  PUERTAS_EVIDENCE: <PASS|FAIL|SKIP>
  PUERTAS_INVARIANT: <PASS|FAIL|SKIP>
  PUERTAS_REVERSIBILITY: <PASS|FAIL|SKIP>
  JUDGE_CONFIDENCE: <integer-0-100-or-n/a>
  GATE_TIMINGS_MS: <json-object>
  PRE-MORTEM: (proposer-supplied; see proposal payload)
  WHAT WORRIES ME MOST: <non-empty-prose-explaining-uncertainty>
  RECOMENDACIÓN: <next-action-recommendation>
